root_cause_summary: A confirmed product defect prevented a matching usage event from appearing on the invoice.
root_cause_details: The event matched the configured customer, event type, property filters, aggregation key, active contract, and rate card, but invoice usage remained zero until engineering replayed the matching job.
resolution_summary: Escalated with reproduction evidence and confirmed engineering replay restored invoice usage.
resolution_steps: Reproduced the issue with a matching test event.
Collected request id req-usage-defect and Event Search evidence.
Escalated the product defect to engineering with the matching configuration.
verification_steps: Reproduce the event matching path with the same configuration.
Verify engineering replay causes invoice usage to update.
Verify the customer invoice usage reflects the accepted event.
verification_results: Reproduction showed the event matched configuration but invoice usage stayed zero.
The customer invoice usage reflected the accepted event after the fix.
